data.title: NRG Energy's $560 Million Acquisition Adds 738 MW of Flexible Gas-Fired Power: Details
data.description: NRG Energy, Inc. to acquire 738 MW of natural gas generation in Texas for $560 million. Deal expected to boost presence in growing energy market.

data.title: Sam Altman Warns AI Will Be Deflationary, But Says OpenAI's Biggest Constraint Isn't Data Or Demand, It's GPUs
data.description: Sam Altman says AI will have a deflationary impact on the global economy, but warns the company's biggest constraint isn't data or demand.

data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Lower After A Brief Respite: 'Add Exposure To Equities' Amid Pullback, Says Expert
data.description: U.S. stock futures fell again on Thursday after a brief respite on Wednesday, following a softer-than-expected inflation print.

data.title: Despite Elon Musk's Efforts, US Spending Soars To New Highs, Deficit Exceeds $1 Trillion
data.description: The U.S. federal spending hit a record-breaking $603.4 billion in February, despite the efficiency drive led by Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk.

data.title: Nokia Secures Deal with Vodafone Idea To Enhance India's IP Backhaul Network
data.description: Nokia chosen by Vodafone Idea Limited to expand and modernize its IP backhaul network in India. Agreement includes deployment of Nokia's latest IP/MPLS solutions.
